purpose: Tracks agent-harness hardening work and active cross-session workstreams. Product scope remains in docs/product.md.

currentTestPolicy.name: essential-protection-line
currentTestPolicy.historicalEvidenceNotice: Feature evidence commands dated before this policy are audit records and may reference removed dedicated tests. Use the current entrypoint for the maintained regression suite.
knownUnprotectedAreas: Live Observation outside capability-token and HTTPS transport security
notifications outside Web Push subscription encryption

features.title: Essential automated test protection line
features.user_visible_behavior: 기본 테스트 명령은 인증, 소유권, 프로젝트 저장, Terraform 생성과 안전 게이트, 승인된 배포와 정리 경로만 필수 보호선으로 검증한다.
verification: 유지 대상 52개 테스트 파일만 저장소에 남는다.
pnpm test가 API, Web, shared types, sandbox evidence, Terraform routing 보호선을 모두 실행한다.
삭제된 전용 테스트가 담당하던 기능은 자동 검증되지 않는 영역으로 명시된다.

evidence.notes: Retained 52 test files and removed 338 from the original 390-file suite. The 47-file baseline passed 518 checks after the dev merge. Five reviewed security files were then restored and passed 54/57 focused checks; three filesystem symlink setup cases were blocked by Windows EPERM before assertions. API lint and typecheck pass.

features.notes: Broader feature-specific suites require an explicit future protection-line decision before being restored.

features.title: Durable agent operating surface
features.user_visible_behavior: 새 세션이 root AGENTS.md, agent-progress.md, feature_list.json, session-handoff.md를 읽고 현재 작업 상태를 복구한다.
verification: AGENTS.md가 하네스 시작/종료 루프를 명시한다.
agent-progress.md가 현재 검증 상태와 다음 행동을 기록한다.
session-handoff.md가 다음 세션의 시작점을 제공한다.
scripts/init-harness.ps1이 필수 하네스 파일과 feature_list.json 구조를 확인한다.

evidence.notes: Root operating loop, progress log, feature tracker, handoff note, clean checklist, evaluator rubric, quality document, and startup helper were created and verified.

features.notes: AGENTS.md를 길게 만드는 대신 지속 상태 파일을 분리한다.

features.title: Standard startup helper
features.user_visible_behavior: 에이전트가 매번 실행 경로를 재발견하지 않고 같은 시작 명령으로 repo 기준선을 확인한다.
verification: scripts/init-harness.ps1이 repo root와 필수 파일을 확인한다.
scripts/init-harness.ps1이 feature_list.json을 파싱한다.
기본 실행은 install이나 lockfile rewrite를 하지 않는다.
-Verify 또는 -Full 플래그가 있을 때만 프로젝트 체크를 실행한다.

evidence.notes: PowerShell helper validates required harness files and feature_list.json without install or lockfile writes.

features.notes: 이 repo의 기본 shell이 PowerShell이므로 init.sh 대신 PowerShell helper를 표준으로 둔다.

features.title: Evidence-bound completion gates
features.user_visible_behavior: 에이전트가 실행 가능한 증거 없이 완료를 선언하지 못하고, 스킵한 검증은 이유와 함께 남긴다.
verification: clean-state-checklist.md가 종료 전 확인 항목을 명시한다.
evaluator-rubric.md가 hard fail 조건과 점수 기준을 명시한다.
passing 상태에는 lastVerified와 commands 증거가 필요하다.

evidence.notes: clean-state-checklist.md and evaluator-rubric.md now make evidence-free completion a harness failure.

features.notes: 증거 없는 passing은 하네스 실패로 취급한다.

features.title: Multi-session handoff discipline
features.user_visible_behavior: 긴 세션 후에도 다음 에이전트가 검증된 것, 미검증 위험, 다음 행동을 바로 볼 수 있다.
verification: agent-progress.md가 세션 레코드를 보존한다.
session-handoff.md가 최신 handoff snapshot을 제공한다.
AGENTS.md가 장기/미완성 작업에서 두 파일 갱신을 요구한다.

evidence.notes: agent-progress.md keeps history and session-handoff.md keeps the latest continuation snapshot.

features.notes: progress는 기록, handoff는 다음 세션용 최신 압축본이다.

features.title: Project quality snapshot
features.user_visible_behavior: 에이전트 작업 품질과 코드베이스 건전성을 별도 문서로 평가한다.
verification: quality-document.md가 초기 품질 스냅샷과 알려진 격차를 기록한다.
evaluator-rubric.md가 세션 산출물 평가 기준을 기록한다.

evidence.notes: quality-document.md records the initial adversarial quality snapshot and remaining harness gaps.

features.notes: 품질 문서는 코드베이스, 루브릭은 에이전트 산출물을 본다.

features.title: Automated harness lint
features.user_visible_behavior: 하네스 파일 구조, single in_progress 규칙, passing evidence 규칙을 CI나 로컬 명령으로 자동 확인한다.
verification: 하네스 lint가 feature_list.json의 status/evidence 규칙을 검사한다.
하네스 lint가 agent-progress.md와 session-handoff.md의 필수 heading 존재를 검사한다.
필요하면 package script로 연결하되 lockfile을 불필요하게 바꾸지 않는다.

evidence.notes: scripts/check-harness.mjs validates feature statuses, passing evidence, required headings, unresolved pending placeholders, and root/docs wiring. package.json exposes it as pnpm harness:check.

features.notes: CI 연결은 아직 하지 않았지만, 독립 실행 가능한 local harness lint는 추가했다.

features.title: Baseline user-journey smoke
features.user_visible_behavior: 핵심 MVP 흐름이 브라우저 또는 API smoke로 확인되어 조기 완료 선언을 막는다.
verification: Representative Use Journey의 최소 happy path가 자동 또는 반자동 smoke로 표현된다.
실제 AWS apply가 필요한 경로는 명시 승인과 cleanup plan 없이 실행하지 않는다.
검증 결과가 agent-progress.md 또는 별도 run report에 남는다.

evidence.notes: Git/CI/CD auto-deploy smoke runner records preflight readiness and live mutation gates, but the live smoke workstream is intentionally deferred by product decision. The stale docs/sw live-smoke plan and current JSON reports were removed from active documentation on 2026-07-09.

features.notes: Blocked by product decision: live GitHub/AWS smoke is not being pursued now. Reopen this feature only when the team decides to collect real deployment evidence again.

features.title: ECS migration operating plan and Fargate foundation
features.user_visible_behavior: SketchCatch 운영 인프라를 EC2/SSM/docker run에서 ECS/Fargate로 전환하기 위한 phase, 비용 기준, rollback 기준을 팀원이 같은 문서와 tracker에서 확인한다.
verification: feature_list.json에 ECS migration workstream이 active 항목으로 존재한다.
동시에 in_progress 상태인 feature/workstream이 1개 이하이다.
docs/sw/spec.md와 docs/sw/plan.md가 parallel ALB cutover, Phase 1 single ECS task, RunTask one-off worker, SQS deferred decision을 기록한다.
infra/aws/terraform이 ECR, ECS/Fargate, task definition, IAM, CloudWatch Logs, security groups, parallel ALB, listener, Fargate ip target group을 정의한다.
Phase 8 Terraform이 API/web 독립 service와 target group, ALB API/health path rule, web default action을 정의하고 ECS steady state에서 nginx를 제외한다.
Phase 9가 SketchCatch production infra를 runtime/edge/data/legacy state로 격리하고 backend lock, import inventory, plan-only approval을 기록한다.
DeploymentJob 모델이 Terraform 실행 요청, 상태 전이, ECS task ARN placeholder, 실패 요약을 기록한다.
API route가 ECS worker mode에서 DeploymentJob을 만들고 ECS RunTask dispatcher로 실행을 위임한다.
agent-progress.md와 session-handoff.md가 최신 phase 상태와 다음 phase 기준을 기록한다.

commands: AWS ECS/ALB/Route53/RDS/CloudWatch read-only verification and HTTPS smoke
evidence.notes: Production Route53 targets the direct-path ECS ALB; API/web run at autoscaling min 1 and max 2, worker RunTask is active, auth runtime preflight covers token and OAuth configuration, and container log alarms require two consecutive error periods without repetitive OK notifications.

features.notes: Warm EC2/ALB/nginx and the legacy ECS service/target group are retired. Cold rollback retains a sanitized encrypted AMI, verified Docker archive, disabled Terraform root, and runbook.

features.title: Accurate and responsive Terraform pre-deployment safety gate
features.user_visible_behavior: 배포 전 검사는 정확히 그룹화된 Trivy 근거를 표시하고, 핵심 규칙은 즉시 반환하며, 심층검사와 AI 설명은 비동기로 갱신한다.
verification: S3 finding은 rule ID별 정확한 한국어 설명과 resourceAddress/riskFamily 그룹을 사용한다.
동일 Terraform 검사는 5분 cache와 single-flight를 사용하고 Plan에서 재사용된다.
Public S3, 공개 SSH, Public RDS, IAM wildcard는 Trivy 시작 전에 deterministic gate로 검사된다.
UI가 핵심 검사, 심층검사 진행, 병합 완료 상태를 구분하고 high finding이 있어도 Plan 생성과 승인을 허용하며, 생성된 Plan은 재생성 대신 승인 단계로 진행한다.

commands: targeted API, scanner, Plan, and Workspace tests
evidence.notes: Focused deployment-safety, approval, Apply, Destroy, Plan, and Workspace tests pass. High findings remain visible but do not block Plan approval, and an existing unapproved apply Plan advances to approval instead of exposing regeneration. Deployment History keeps Destroy Plan regeneration available beside approval, then beside Destroy execution after approval. Lint, typecheck, and build pass. The full web suite still has four unrelated baseline failures in diagram toolbar CSS, dashboard projects route expectations, a missing personal docs inventory file, and a stale resource catalog count.

features.notes: No cloud apply, destroy, or external deployment mutation was performed.

features.title: Server-verified Live Observation v2
features.user_visible_behavior: 검증된 Deployment를 선택해 15분 관측 세션을 시작하고, 실제 요청·CloudWatch·capacity 증거와 scale-out 진행을 안전한 시네마틱 화면에서 확인한다.
verification: v2 manifest, capability, Store, collector, IAM, CloudFront, AWS adapter 계약이 provider-neutral core seam 뒤에서 연결된다.
기능 flag는 Redis/Chromium/approved AWS sandbox gate가 모두 통과할 때까지 false다.
credential 원문·hash·URL이 RDS, S3, Redis, 로그, localStorage, sessionStorage에 남지 않는다.
in-memory와 Redis Store adapter가 같은 원자 동작 contract suite를 통과한다.
desktop/mobile/reduced-motion 브라우저 흐름이 실제 snapshot 값과 lifecycle cleanup을 검증한다.
실제 AWS apply/destroy는 별도 명시 승인이 있을 때만 수행한다.
features.notes: Implementation and automated verification merged in PR #382. External acceptance is deferred to issue #378 because the in-app browser blocks localhost and the current environment has no reachable AWS STS credentials. The feature flag remains false until credentialed Chromium and an approved AWS sandbox provide evidence.

features.title: Project deployment target and shared release ledger
features.user_visible_behavior: 개발자는 프로젝트의 단일 배포 타깃을 설정하고 Direct/GitOps 릴리즈의 version, SHA, digest, provider revision, Output URL을 한 이력에서 확인한다.
verification: 프로젝트당 배포 타깃 row가 하나만 존재하고 소유하지 않은 connection 변경을 차단한다.
Direct와 GitOps 릴리즈가 같은 API와 History UI 계약을 사용한다.
SemVer tag, manifest version, SHA fallback과 artifact digest가 결정적으로 계산된다.
provider revision drift와 legacy Deployment backfill 호환이 테스트된다.

commands: PostgreSQL 16 temporary container: apply apps/api/drizzle/0000..0035 with psql ON_ERROR_STOP=1
evidence.notes: Project target, shared release ledger, authorization, structured build evidence, migration/backfill, History UI, and legacy Deployment adapters passed. API full suite has three unrelated Windows symlink fixture setup failures (EPERM); all #371-focused tests pass.

features.notes: Implemented in issue #371 on branch feature/sw/371-project-deployment-release-ledger. No cloud mutation was performed.

features.title: Revision-locked three-stage Direct Deployment
features.user_visible_behavior: 개발자는 Board와 Terraform을 한 번에 저장하고 검증, 승인, 배포 세 단계만 거쳐 프로젝트를 배포한다.
verification: Ctrl+S와 Command+S가 diagram과 Terraform draft를 같은 server revision으로 저장한다.
prepare가 최신 saved revision만 받아 immutable Deployment를 만들고 stale revision을 거부한다.
approval snapshot과 execute snapshot이 다르면 실행이 차단된다.
Direct Deployment UI가 정확히 세 단계와 summary-first 운영 정보를 표시한다.

commands: PostgreSQL 16 temporary container: apply apps/api/drizzle/0000..0036 with psql ON_ERROR_STOP=1
evidence.notes: Focused deployment contracts, Web 1,145/1,145, migration compatibility, PostgreSQL migrations, harness, lint, typecheck, and build passed. API passed 1,456/1,459; the only failures are three unchanged Windows symlink fixture setup EPERM errors.

features.notes: Implemented in issue #372 on branch feature/sw/372-direct-deploy-three-stage. No cloud mutation was performed.

features.title: Repository-confirmed ECS/Fargate GitOps release
features.user_visible_behavior: 개발자는 확인한 Docker build 설정으로 immutable ECR image를 만들고 ECS/Fargate 즉시 교체 단계, 마스킹 로그, 릴리즈 증거를 확인한다.
verification: 미확인 또는 모호한 Docker build config는 GitOps handoff와 workflow 실행을 차단한다.
ApplicationRelease가 version, commit SHA, image digest, ECS task revision, Output URL을 기록한다.
ECS minimum healthy 0, maximum 100, circuit breaker rollback 계약이 workflow와 provider 재조회에서 검증된다.
CI/CD 화면이 build, publish, deploy, health 단계와 마스킹된 증분 로그를 표시한다.

commands: pnpm --filter @sketchcatch/api exec tsx --test src/git-cicd/ecs-gitops-release-reconciler.test.ts src/git-cicd/git-cicd-workflows.test.ts src/git-cicd/github-actions-run-provider.test.ts src/git-cicd/git-cicd-pipeline-run-service.test.ts src/releases/project-release-ledger-service.test.ts src/routes/project-release-ledger.test.ts src/routes/git-cicd-handoffs.test.ts
evidence.notes: Focused API 87/87 and target-state 6/6 passed. Full Web tests passed; API passed 1,468/1,471 with only three unchanged Windows symlink fixture EPERM failures. Migration compatibility, harness, lint, typecheck, and build passed.

features.notes: Implemented in issue #373 on feature/sw/373-ecs-gitops-release. No cloud mutation was performed; sandbox deployment and rollback evidence remain assigned to issue #378.

features.title: Repository-confirmed Lambda AllAtOnce GitOps release
features.user_visible_behavior: Developers publish an immutable Lambda artifact from confirmed SAM evidence, promote it through an alias with CodeDeploy AllAtOnce, and inspect verified release evidence.
verification: GitOps handoff rejects missing, ambiguous, or stale SAM build evidence.
ApplicationRelease records the commit, artifact digest, Lambda version, alias revision, deployment result, and Output URL.
CodeDeployDefault.LambdaAllAtOnce and automatic failure rollback are verified in both workflow and provider re-query.
CI/CD stages expose masked build, publish, deploy, rollback, and health evidence without demo-only fallbacks.

commands: pnpm --filter @sketchcatch/api exec tsx --test src/db/project-release-ledger-schema.test.ts src/git-cicd/git-cicd-workflows.test.ts src/git-cicd/github-actions-run-provider.test.ts src/git-cicd/lambda-gitops-release-reconciler.test.ts src/git-cicd/git-cicd-pipeline-run-service.test.ts src/releases/project-release-ledger-service.test.ts src/routes/git-cicd-handoffs.test.ts src/routes/project-release-ledger.test.ts
PostgreSQL 16 temporary container: apply migrations 0000..0038 with runtime migrator
evidence.notes: Focused API 100/100 and target-state 8/8 passed. Full Web tests passed; API passed 1,481/1,484 with only three unchanged Windows symlink fixture EPERM failures. Migration compatibility, PostgreSQL migrations, lint, typecheck, and build passed.

features.notes: Implemented in issue #374 on feature/sw/374-lambda-gitops-release. No AWS mutation was performed; sandbox deployment, rollback, and cleanup evidence remain assigned to issue #378.

features.title: Repository-confirmed EC2/ASG CodeDeploy AllAtOnce GitOps release
features.user_visible_behavior: Developers publish a versioned S3 bundle from confirmed AppSpec evidence, deploy it to the configured Auto Scaling group with CodeDeploy AllAtOnce, and inspect verified instance and rollback evidence.
verification: GitOps handoff rejects missing, ambiguous, or stale AppSpec build evidence.
ApplicationRelease records the commit, bundle digest and version, CodeDeploy revision, instance result, and Output URL.
CodeDeployDefault.AllAtOnce, the configured Auto Scaling group, all target instance success, and rollback policy are verified by provider re-query.
A failed deployment or health check restores the previous verified bundle and records masked rollback evidence.

evidence.notes: Focused workflow/provider/reconciler tests passed 31/31. Full Web and other workspace tests passed; API had only three unchanged Windows symlink fixture EPERM setup failures. PostgreSQL 16 migrations, compatibility, lint, typecheck, build, and harness passed.

features.notes: Sandbox deployment, rollback, and cleanup evidence remain assigned to issue #378; no AWS mutation is authorized in this workstream.

features.title: Repository-confirmed static S3 and CloudFront GitOps release with common logs
features.user_visible_behavior: Developers publish a confirmed static output to an immutable S3 prefix, switch the configured CloudFront origin path, and inspect common stages, logs, release evidence, and rollback state.
verification: Repository analysis and GitOps handoff reject missing, ambiguous, or stale static output evidence.
ApplicationRelease records the manifest digest, versioned release prefix, CloudFront revision, invalidation, rollback pointer, and Output URL.
ECS, Lambda, EC2, and Static runs share the same stage, incremental masked log, and release UI contract.
Branch and monitored paths are edited only in project settings; the CI/CD console contains execution information only.

commands: pnpm --filter api exec tsx --test src/db/project-release-ledger-schema.test.ts src/releases/project-release-ledger-service.test.ts src/routes/project-release-ledger.test.ts src/source-repositories/repository-analysis.test.ts src/source-repositories/repository-analysis-failure.test.ts src/routes/git-cicd-handoffs.test.ts src/git-cicd/git-cicd-workflows.test.ts src/git-cicd/github-actions-run-provider.test.ts src/git-cicd/static-site-gitops-release-reconciler.test.ts
generated static workflow run blocks validated with Git for Windows bash -n
evidence.notes: Focused API contracts passed 107/107, source repository route regression passed 17/17, target state passed 10/10, and CI/CD layout passed 103/103. Static workflow bash syntax, PostgreSQL 16 migrations, compatibility, lint, typecheck, build, and harness passed. Full Web and other workspace tests passed; API had only three unchanged Windows symlink fixture EPERM setup failures.

features.notes: Sandbox deployment, rollback, and cleanup evidence remain assigned to issue #378; no AWS mutation is authorized in this workstream.

features.title: Durable deployment Inbox, SSE, and Web Push
features.user_visible_behavior: 개발자는 Direct와 GitOps 배포의 성공, 실패, 취소 알림을 세션을 넘어 유지되는 Inbox와 명시적으로 허용한 Web Push에서 확인한다.
verification: Direct Deployment와 GitOps Pipeline Run terminal event가 같은 transaction의 idempotent Inbox/outbox row를 만든다.
읽음 상태와 90일 retention은 RDS가 source of truth다.
인증 SSE와 Service Worker Web Push가 같은 notification ID와 안전한 프로젝트 경로를 전달한다.
subscription endpoint와 key는 암호화되고 Push outbound DNS는 public address에만 고정된다.
권한 거부, 만료, 영구 실패, bounded retry, 사용자 소유권이 테스트된다.

commands: pnpm --filter api exec tsx --test src/notifications/*.test.ts src/routes/notifications.test.ts src/db/notification-schema.test.ts src/live-observations/live-observation-https-transport.test.ts
PostgreSQL terminal trigger integration: Direct/GitOps idempotency, owner, retention, and duplicate-source assertions
evidence.notes: Notification-focused tests, migration compatibility, clean PostgreSQL migrations and trigger integration, Terraform tests, lint, typecheck, and build passed. Full Web and other workspace tests passed; API passed 1,525/1,528 with only the three unchanged Windows symlink fixture EPERM setup failures.

features.notes: No Web Push provider call, cloud mutation, GitHub mutation, or production database migration was performed. Sandbox browser delivery evidence remains assigned to issue #378.

features.title: Project deployment non-production sandbox E2E
features.user_visible_behavior: 운영자는 승인된 non-production 환경에서 Direct 3개 scope와 GitOps 4개 runtime, 실제 관측·알림·rollback·cleanup을 하나의 상관관계 검증 report로 확인한다.
features.blockedReason: Static, Lambda, and EC2/ASG GitOps acceptance, persisted pipeline correlation, Web Push delivery, and rollback evidence remain incomplete and must resume on the dedicated Issue #378 branch.
verification: preflight가 STS identity를 직접 확인하고 production AWS/API/GitHub target을 거부한다.
Direct 3개 scope와 GitOps 4개 runtime의 실제 완료 증거가 모두 존재한다.
commit, CI log hash, release identity, Output URL, QR 요청, CloudWatch, Inbox/Web Push가 서로 연결된다.
각 GitOps runtime의 의도한 실패가 이전 검증 revision으로 rollback된다.
Destroy 후 ECR, S3, CodeBuild, CloudWatch 임시 artifact가 남지 않는다.

evidence.notes: Code implementation is complete: the exact Direct/GitOps matrix is represented by a fail-closed three-stage orchestration contract with cleanup-on-failure and verification-gated success; standalone SAM/CodeDeploy detection, Static application-local lockfile selection, source-root installs, provider status persistence, and runtime-aware cleanup are implemented. Direct ECS evidence remains verified. ECS GitOps Infra run 29334708442 and App run 29334822683 succeeded for SHA 3a12e55c13e7be1a769cfbe920b112516d8c14ce, digest 20ec77dba90b910f1a37fd1f9194b0ff4829f789d6548abf3b21262df04632e1, task definition revision 7, HTTPS 200, and desired/running 1/1. Project refresh returned stale=false with all seven stages succeeded, 1,161 masked logs, and a persisted matching ApplicationRelease. External ID rotation accepted the new value and rejected the old value. Destroy run 29337235499 succeeded; direct queries show zero cost-bearing issue resources, buckets, OIDC provider, task definitions, and task roles. QR, Static, Lambda, EC2/ASG, Web Push delivery, and rollback real-environment acceptance remain pending, so the feature stays in_progress. The maintained protection line covers sandbox preflight, deployment safety/apply/destroy, deployment routes, and Web deployment controls; removed feature-specific commands remain historical evidence only.

features.title: Architecture Board Compiler and Workspace AI Chat
features.user_visible_behavior: AI Draft, Board 자동 정리, Reverse Engineering, Template 검토가 같은 Compiler 제안·diff·승인 경계를 통해 읽기 쉬운 Architecture Board를 만든다.
verification: 29개 사용 가능한 Template 사례와 1개 실패 evidence로 versioned knowledge artifact를 검증한다.
사례 기반 spacing 후보는 baseline보다 겹침·경계 이탈·edge 관통/교차·역방향·support lane 침범을 늘리지 않는다.
동일한 입력은 동일한 Compiler proposal, diff, diagnostic, quality 결과를 반환한다.
AI Draft, Board 자동 정리, Reverse Engineering, Template 검토가 동일한 Compiler Interface를 사용한다.
Template variant는 source fingerprint와 visual-only approval 범위가 일치할 때만 authored source 위에 적용된다.
자동 정리는 미리보기·적용·취소·Undo 경계를 유지하며 승인 전 Board를 변경하지 않는다.
Workspace AI Chat의 세 대화 범위와 stale proposal 차단이 실제 상태·접근성 동작과 일치한다.

commands: pnpm --dir apps/api exec tsx --test --test-name-pattern "Terraform (오류 설명 API|에이전트 리뷰 API)" src/app.test.ts
evidence.notes: 000 Compiler implementation is complete: the checked-in 29+1 knowledge artifact expands bounded geometry candidates, keeps source/requested-original/presentation/semantic selection explicit, forwards Reverse Engineering diagnostics, and fingerprint-gates visual-only Template variants. Workspace AI Chat resolves Terraform diagnostics against the named source file, restricts automatic unexpected-token fixes to brace-preserving cases, avoids unsafe synthesized deletions, removes external-provider latency from issue resolution, and keeps long Error Analysis results inside an always-scrollable transcript without redundant checks or a trailing next-step section. Expanded error technical details are grouped into readable facts, cause, raw error, numbered resolution steps, and vertical code comparison without provider metadata. Successful analyses are stored per project as collapsible `error.type(line)` history entries so prior full results remain available after tab changes or reloads while safe-fix actions stay limited to the current result. Terraform Agent Review now starts from the AI Chat footer, uses the latest full Terraform snapshot, requires Amazon Q Business, narrates progress, rebuilds the summary from the clearest strengths and highest-priority problems, translates raw Terraform terms into plain Korean, and shows all six ordered Well-Architected criteria as problem/action or strength/evidence with explicit normal/review/serious styling. Failed responses are not cached, useful partial or truncated Amazon Q output is recovered, 503 messages preserve the actionable failure category, pillar text is no longer cut at 120 characters or displayed when it lacks a complete Korean sentence ending, and judgment/evidence text is split into separate blocks even without provider pipe separators. PR #429 review follow-up now gates local persistence until the current project has hydrated, safely handles optional provider metadata and mixed-type conclusion aliases, and avoids duplicated Korean resource wording. Focused API/Web regressions, harness checks, and signed-in Chrome verification pass. The aggregate feature remains in_progress until the pending real-Board human review is completed.

features.notes: Compiler proposals may diagnose but do not hard-reject requirement, deployment, Provider, or Terraform conflicts; application remains user-accepted and Deployment safety remains unchanged.

features.title: Measured production ECS deployment acceleration
features.user_visible_behavior: 운영자는 API와 web image를 ECR remote cache로 병렬 빌드하고 immutable digest로 배포하며, 실제 production 실행에서 단계별 소요 시간과 rollback 기준을 확인한다.
verification: API와 web image가 분리된 job에서 ECR registry cache를 사용해 병렬 build/push된다.
cache tag는 ECS에 배포되지 않고 검증된 release digest만 task definition에 반영된다.
생성된 사용자 ECS/Fargate CodeBuild workflow도 ECR remote cache와 release digest 검증을 유지한다.
production preflight, 실제 ECS 배포, post-deploy health smoke, read-only Terraform plan이 성공한다.

commands: GitHub Actions Deploy Production ECS run 29333857003
GitHub Actions Production Infrastructure Plan run 29334381609
evidence.notes: Production completed in 6m09s versus the 7m51s median baseline. Warm image build-push critical path was 7s versus 81s. API/web stabilization was 3m13s/2m56s, all health endpoints returned 200, and the read-only runtime plan reported no infrastructure changes. The full workspace test attempt timed out after 15 minutes; focused changed-path tests and all required build checks passed.

features.notes: The 5m30s total stretch target remains unmet; validation and API stabilization are the next measured bottlenecks.

features.title: Korean repository recommendations with required inline CI/CD connection
features.user_visible_behavior: Repository Analysis 추천에서 GitHub CI/CD를 연결하면 분석한 Repository가 자동 연결되고, callback 확인 버튼이 배포 타깃과 GitOps 설정을 모두 저장한 뒤 재분석 없이 기존 상태로 돌아가 Architecture Board 생성을 계속한다.
verification: AI와 deterministic 추천 후보가 한국어 추천 이유와 고려할 점을 각각 최소 2개 제공한다.
추가 질문, 선택지, 이유가 한국어로 표시되고 알려진 구형 영문 질문도 한국어로 정규화된다.
CI/CD 인계 checkbox와 전역 설정 이동을 제거하고 같은 화면에서 분석 Repository에 고정된 GitHub App 설치를 시작한다.
CI/CD 연결 없이 확인하면 이동을 중단하고 확인 버튼 위에 작은 빨간 안내 문구를 표시한다.
GitHub callback은 Repository 재선택 없이 서명된 target만 자동 연결하며, 두 개별 저장 버튼 대신 하단 확인 버튼이 두 API를 순서대로 저장한 뒤 복귀한다.
Callback 완료 액션 바는 두 저장 결과를 설명하고 48px CTA, 저장 중 상태, 인라인 오류, 모바일 전체 너비를 제공한다.
nullable runtimeConfig와 잘못된 Repository URL은 TypeError 대신 제어된 배포 또는 Source Repository 오류로 차단한다.
30분짜리 일회성 browser resume state는 project와 active Repository가 일치할 때만 소비되며 API 재분석 없이 추천 상태를 복원한다.
어떤 추천 Template을 선택해도 callback 배포 타깃은 ECS Fargate이며 project slug, commit SHA, Dockerfile evidence로 필수 좌표를 채운다.
whiskend/audience-live-check의 명확한 컨테이너 근거는 AI confidence 재정렬 이후에도 ECS Fargate를 1순위로 유지한다.

Callback-wide ECS defaults, ordered single-confirm saves, and completion action bar contracts passed focused callback tests 6/6. Null runtime configuration and malformed URL review regressions passed 7/7. Harness, lint, typecheck, and build passed. features.title: Provider-neutral deployment optimization contract and verified Terraform Plan reuse
features.user_visible_behavior: 사용자는 같은 배포 요구를 반복 검증할 때 검증된 pending Terraform Plan을 재사용하고, 실제 no-change Plan은 승인·hash·계정·region·drift 증거를 다시 확인한 뒤 불필요한 Terraform Apply를 생략한다.
verification: 모든 deployable ResourceDefinition은 provider-neutral desired-state 최적화 capability를 자동 상속하고 data source, UNKNOWN, catalog-only definition은 명시적으로 제외한다.
Terraform bundle, provider lock/identity, target account/region, state lineage/serial이 Plan identity를 구성하며 drift TTL 만료는 새 Plan을 강제한다.
실제 tfplan과 versioned S3 sidecar, Plan summary, Pre-Deployment 결과가 검증된 pending Plan만 재사용한다.
동일 Plan 요청은 single-flight로 합치고 cache 검증 실패는 정상 Plan으로 fallback한다.
실제 no-change Plan만 기존 승인과 hash/account/region/TTL gate를 통과한 뒤 Terraform Apply를 생략한다.
Plan, Apply, Destroy는 terraform -target 없이 기존 전체 그래프와 사용자 승인 경계를 유지한다.

evidence.notes: Focused verification passed: ResourceDefinition 9/9, API/deployment/route 83/83, and existing approval/Destroy regressions 22/22. Harness, migration compatibility, lint, typecheck, and all five package builds passed. Full pnpm test remains non-green only on the same three pre-existing three-tier Template layout/parent contract failures in packages/types; this change does not modify those Template sources or tests.

features.notes: PR 1 implements only the IaC desired-state layer. PR 2 / issue #433 is tracked separately below; runtime no-op remains in issue #435. No DB migration, live AWS mutation, Terraform apply/destroy, or user Git/CI/CD handoff was performed.

features.title: Provider-neutral ApplicationArtifact Registry shared by Direct and GitOps
features.user_visible_behavior: 사용자는 같은 Source Repository commit과 정규화된 build 계약으로 만든 application artifact가 사용자 provider storage에 그대로 존재하고 digest·계정·region·project ownership이 다시 검증되면 Direct Deployment와 Git/CI/CD에서 중복 build 없이 재사용한다.
verification: container image, Lambda zip, CodeDeploy bundle, static bundle, Kubernetes manifest, Helm chart, machine image를 provider-neutral kind로 구분한다.
repository identity, commit SHA, normalized build config, build contract, target platform, secret-free build input만 canonical fingerprint에 포함하고 orchestrator/capacity 값은 제외한다.
RDS에는 identity와 provider metadata만 저장하고 실제 사용자 artifact byte는 사용자 ECR/S3 또는 provider storage에 유지한다.
재사용 전에 provider 존재, exact SHA-256 digest, account, region, namespace/reference, project ownership을 read-only로 검증하며 실패는 정상 build fallback으로 처리한다.
project-scoped unique claim, heartbeat lease, hashed claim token, composite release FK가 duplicate build와 cross-project reuse를 차단한다.
Direct와 GitOps release가 같은 registry를 사용하며 release evidence v1은 유지하고 strict v2 artifact extension을 검증한다.

evidence.notes: Focused PR 2 contracts pass 55/55. Harness, migration compatibility, lint, typecheck, and all five package builds pass. The API suite passes 666/669; the three remaining failures are pre-existing Windows EPERM failures while the tests attempt to create symlinks. test:core separately stops on the three pre-existing three-tier Template scope/position/parent assertions before the API package runs. A transient notification SSE bad-port failure was traced to this host's Windows dynamic port range 1024-15000 overlapping Fetch-blocked ports; the isolated test and the second full API run passed it.

features.notes: Migration 0045 is used because another branch reserved 0044; _journal.json changes with the new entry. The lockfile changes only for the existing-version @aws-sdk/client-ecr dependency. Generated workflows remain valid v1 producers while strict v2 consumers are available. No real credential, live AWS mutation, Terraform apply/destroy, user deployment, or Git handoff was executed. PR 3 / issue #435 was not started.
